howItWorks.intro: This air quality health calculator uses established formulas to provide accurate results.
rules: AQI 0-50: Good, 51-100: Moderate, 101-150: Unhealthy for Sensitive Groups
Sensitive groups: children, elderly, asthma, heart/lung disease
howItWorks.outro: Energy costs and incentives change by region and season. Check with your local utility for current rates.

faq.question: What is AQI?
faq.answer: Air Quality Index (AQI) is a scale from 0-500 measuring air pollution levels. It accounts for PM2.5, PM10, ozone, NO₂, SO₂, and CO. AQI above 100 is considered unhealthy for sensitive groups.

faq.question: What is PM2.5?
faq.answer: PM2.5 are fine particles less than 2.5 micrometers in diameter — small enough to enter your lungs and bloodstream. Sources include wildfire smoke, vehicle exhaust, and industrial emissions. It's the most health-relevant pollutant in AQI.

faq.question: Do air purifiers help with poor AQI?
faq.answer: Yes, HEPA air purifiers can reduce indoor PM2.5 by 50-80%. Run them on high during poor AQI days with windows closed. A $100-200 HEPA purifier is one of the best health investments for areas with frequent air quality issues.

faq.question: Is the Air Quality Health Calculator free to use?
faq.answer: Yes, completely free with no signup required. Use it as many times as you need — there are no limits or hidden fees.

faq.question: How accurate is this calculator?
faq.answer: This calculator uses standard practical calculation formulas trusted by users. Results are reliable estimates for planning purposes. For critical decisions, we recommend consulting a qualified professional to verify.

sections.title: What Is the Air Quality Health Calculator?
sections.body: The Air Quality Health Calculator is a free online tool designed for users who need quick, accurate calculations in the practical calculation space. By entering your aqi reading, sensitive group?, you get instant results including aqi category, health risk, recommendation. No formulas to memorize, no spreadsheets to build — just enter your numbers and get the answer in seconds. Whether you're a beginner or experienced professional, this calculator saves you time and eliminates guesswork.

sections.title: Why This Calculation Matters
sections.body: Getting aqi category right can make the difference between success and costly mistakes. In practical calculation, small errors compound quickly. Manual calculations are error-prone and time-consuming, especially under pressure. This calculator applies proven formulas used by users worldwide, giving you confidence that your numbers are correct. Use it to get accurate results with precision and avoid common pitfalls that trip up beginners.

sections.title: When Should You Use This Calculator?

It's also great for quick estimates before committing to a decision, and to double-check manual calculations or professional quotes, and when comparing different scenarios side by side. Bookmark this page and come back whenever you need a fast, reliable answer — the calculator is always free and requires no signup.
